violations.text: The side door (employee entrance) is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine, and the condenser fan guard in walk-in cooler #2, have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, black/brown residues, and other debris. These areas must be properly cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025

ROP seafood observed unopened/uncut thawing in the walk-in cooler. Temperature observed at 36 degrees F. ROP seafood must be opened when thawing to allow oxygen to enter. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/19/2023

The doors to the outside, located at the entrance, are not tight-fitting. Visible spaces observed between the 2 doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2023
